prompt: User says: 'Install spec kit'. Claude Code is installed (path /Users/didi/.local/bin/claude), spec-env.json doesn't exist, no old skills.
expected: Agent should execute Install mode (7 steps): 1) Detect Claude Code ✅ 2) Interactively ask WORKSPACE, confirm DOC_DIR=doc, detect CLAUDE_CLI 3) Copy 3 skills (spec-task-progress, claude-code-spec-driver, claude-code-spec-monitor) from {KIT_DIR} to {SKILLS_DIR}/ 4) Run path validation checks 5) Read claude-sample.md, detect CLAUDE.md language via CJK ratio, translate if needed, build path-resolution prefix with actual values, inject — NOTE: placeholders ({SPEC_DIR}, {SPEC_PATH}, etc.) remain verbatim in body; actual values appear only in the prefix table 6) Read claude-reference-sample.md, translate with same language, write to ~/.claude/CLAUDE-reference.md 7) Copy spec-stateflow to ~/.claude/skills/

prompt: User says: 'Install spec kit'. Claude Code is not installed (which claude returns nothing).
expected: Agent should abort at Install Step 1, inform 'Claude Code is not installed or unavailable. Please install first.', do not proceed

prompt: User says: 'Uninstall spec'. All spec components exist (spec-env.json, 3 skills, spec-stateflow, claude.md spec content).
expected: Agent should execute Uninstall mode: 1) List found components (including claude-reference.md), confirm with user ⛔ 2) Remove spec-env.json 3) Remove 3 skills 4) Remove spec-stateflow 5) Detect spec content in CLAUDE.md via BEGIN/END markers, preview, confirm, remove marker block (primary path); fall through to legacy 3-strategy removal (A→B→C) only if markers absent 6) Remove claude-reference.md 7) Cleanup monitor state files. Show completion report.

prompt: User says: 'Uninstall spec'. No spec components found (nothing installed).
expected: Agent should inform 'Nothing to uninstall', abort without removing anything

prompt: User says: 'Uninstall spec'. Components found, but user declines the confirmation prompt.
expected: Agent should abort uninstall, do not remove anything

prompt: User says: 'Install spec kit'. ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md already contains spec-stateflow keyword. The existing CLAUDE.md has >30% CJK characters.
expected: Agent should at Install Step 5: 1) Detect existing spec content via BEGIN/END markers, ask overwrite 2) Calculate CJK ratio using python logic → is_cjk=True → translate claude-sample.md to Chinese 3) Build path-resolution prefix with actual values from spec-env.json (e.g. WORKSPACE=/Users/didi/MasProjects); inject prefix + translated body — placeholders ({SPEC_DIR}, {CLAUDE_CLI}, etc.) remain verbatim in body, actual values appear only in the prefix table
Agent should ask user: 'Install or uninstall?' to determine the correct mode before proceeding

prompt: User says: '安装spec'. The existing CLAUDE.md is empty (new file).
expected: Agent should route to Install mode (Chinese trigger matched). At Install Step 5: empty CLAUDE.md → CJK ratio = 0 → check request language ('安装spec' is Chinese) → is_cjk = True → translate claude-sample.md to Chinese → build path-resolution prefix with actual values, inject translated content; placeholders remain verbatim in body

prompt: User says: 'Install spec kit'. {SKILLS_DIR}/../spec-env.json exists but contains invalid JSON.
expected: Agent should at Step 2: warn user 'spec-env.json is corrupted (invalid JSON)', offer to overwrite with fresh config. If user declines → abort.
